caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones sits in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The text on his shirt reads "I DON'T NEED TO DO" above a larger, partially obscured word starting with "S". To his left, a white mannequin wears a white garment. In the background, various photos are mounted on the wall, and clothing hangs on a rack. Two logos are visible on the bottom of the scene: a circular black and white logo containing the text "BONE" and a red logo that reads "BONE FLY TOT". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his facial expression and head angle while looking off-camera to his left, suggesting he is engaged in a conversation.
